### 🛡️ All 8 Workstreams

**1A – Registry:** Active Dutch B.V., KvK 08072948. Founded 1994. 30+ year family-founded PVC compounder. Modern 2021 factory. ISCC certified.

**2A – Ownership:** ⚠️ **MATERIAL CHANGE**: Parcom (Dutch mid-market PE) acquired Plastchem ~**April 17, 2026** — 5 weeks ago. KvK UBO register likely not yet updated. Previous director: Venextra Plastics Holding B.V. (from 2012). Parcom: mainstream Dutch PE, no adverse findings.

**3A – Sanctions: ALL CLEAN** — OFAC, OpenSanctions, UN SC: NO HITS on entity, Sonnega, Venextra, Parcom.

**4A – Adverse Media:** Only news is the Parcom acquisition (positive M&A). No violations, incidents, or enforcement.

**5A – Litigation:** None found.

**6A – PEP:** Onno-Pieter Sonnega — NOT a PEP. Parcom — NOT a PEP.

**7A – Trade Risk:** PVC compounds — standard industrial materials, no dual-use or sanctions concerns. ISCC certification signals compliant sourcing.

**8A – Priority Actions:**
1. Updated KvK UBO extract post-acquisition
2. Identify the "3 additional persons/entities" alongside Venextra
3. Parcom Capital Management B.V. profile confirmation
